description_for_human: Get social sentiment scores for any crypto token using recent Twitter and Reddit mentions.
description_for_model: Analyzes recent social media mentions of a crypto token and returns a sentiment score from -100 (very negative) to +100 (very positive), along with positive/negative/neutral ratios and a plain-English summary. Requires x402 micropayment ($0.05 per call on Base network).

tools.name: analyze_token_sentiment
tools.description: Analyze social sentiment for a crypto token.

chain_id.description: Optional chain ID, e.g. 8453 for Base
